MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-20-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS LAURA FRANCES AMBROSENO AND RAFFAELE SAVI AS TRUSTEES OF THE SAVI-AMBROSENO FAMILY 2016 LIVING TRUST'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND LIFT ONLY THE LITIGATION STAY WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY STEVEN HAMMOND, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS AND EVAN ROSENBAUM, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS. THE HONORABLE GARRETT L. WONG RECUSED HIMSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER. THE HONORABLE SAMUEL K. FENG HEARD THE MATTER. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND LIFT THE LITIGATION STAY, CONSTRUCTION STAY REMAINS. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/09/20 IS CONTINUED TO 03/15/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Steven Hammond; Clark Hill LLP; 415-984-8500; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiffs Laura Frances Ambroseno and Raffaele Savi as trustees of the Savi-Ambroseno Family 2016 Living Trust.

No other appearances.

Not contested. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS DIOSDADO BANATAO and MARIA BANATAO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No authority on point is cited and no evidence is provided that the term "otherwise" as used in the easement clause does not contemplate a temporary obstruction created by objects/people being temporarily on the roof. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
